title: BAL recognized as Tier 1 in Immigration Law in 2026 edition of Best Law Firms®, adds Atlanta to top tier | BAL Immigration Law
content:
BAL is again proudly featured in the 2026 edition of Best Law Firms® by Best Lawyers, a recognition awarded to only the top 3.8% of law firms across the United States.
BAL ranked Tier 1 in Immigration Law at the national level and across eight offices: Boston, Chicago, Colorado, Dallas/Fort Worth, Houston, San Francisco, Washington, D.C. and—a new addition to the list after opening its office—Atlanta.
“We are excited for BAL’s continued recognition and growth in the legal industry,” said CEO Jeremy Fudge . “With the addition of Atlanta to our roster, we cement our reputation of excellence in the immigration field and uphold the superior service we provide to our clients.”
With the opening of the Atlanta office in 2024 and the significant expansion of the team in Northern Virginia this year, BAL’s consistent growth is a testament to the positive experience the firm provides to clients and attorneys alike.
Best Law Firms is an independently produced and trusted benchmark of excellence in the legal industry. Thousands of client references, peer-lawyers and company leaders are interviewed by research teams to determine law firm rankings each year.
